# zeam-sdk-go

> Official Go SDK for the Zeam Platform API Gateway. Secure-by-default,
> opinionated, and kept in lockstep with the gateway contract.

## Purpose

The SDK abstracts the gateway's two authentication tracks (Business OTP and
Connect SEP-10), its SPEC §18 response envelope, canonical error codes, and
the 9-step Connect off-ramp payment orchestration behind a small set of
typed Go APIs.

## Public packages

- `github.com/ZeamMoney/zeam-sdk-go` — top-level `Client`, options, errors.
- `.../auth` — sessions, token store, OTP and SEP-10 flows, autorefresh.
- `.../stellar` — narrow wrapper over the Stellar SDK (keypair, signer, asset).
- `.../client/<domain>` — typed 1:1 clients for gateway endpoints.
- `.../recipes` — opinionated end-to-end workflows.
- `.../webhook` — inbound HMAC signature verification with replay protection.

## Non-public packages

- `.../internal/*` and `.../transport/*` are implementation details and
  may change without notice.

## Relationship to the gateway

The SDK declares `zeam.MinGatewayVersion` and performs a runtime handshake
against `/healthz` so a mismatched gateway fails fast. SDK `vA.B.C` targets
gateway `vA.B.≥0`.

## Docs

- Getting started: [docs/getting-started.md](docs/getting-started.md)
- Recipes: [docs/recipes.md](docs/recipes.md)
- Versioning policy: [docs/versioning.md](docs/versioning.md)
- Security policy: [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md)
